[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0100011001 4
1 0101100111 6
2 1010101100 5
3 1110111101 8
4 1100111101 7
5 1111111101 9
6 1111111010 8
7 1101111010 7

70 07 1111101111 9
